on_screen_text:
3000 రూపాయల English Coaching class పనికిరాకుండా పోయినప్పుడు... [When a 3000 rupees English coaching class goes to waste...]

MySivi యాప్‌లో AI ఉపాధ్యాయునితో కేవలం ₹1 కే ENGLISH నేర్చుకోవడం ప్రారంభించిన తర్వాత... [After starting to learn ENGLISH for just ₹1 with an AI teacher on MySivi app...]
summary: This split-screen meme ad uses popular comedy clips of actor Brahmanandam to contrast the frustration of wasting 3000 rupees on ineffective English coaching with the happiness of learning English for just 1 rupee. It promotes the MySivi app's affordable AI-powered English learning solution.
